potion.name: Potion
potion.description: A small bottle that restores health.

herb.name: Herb
herb.description: A common medicinal plant gathered near town.

bandage.name: Bandage
bandage.description: A tidy strip of cloth stitched from traveler gear.

ration.name: Travel Ration
ration.description: Dried fruit, bread, and salted meat packed for the road.

greater_potion.name: Greater Potion
greater_potion.description: A stronger tonic kept behind better counters and bought by people expecting real danger.

mana_tonic.name: Mana Tonic
mana_tonic.description: A bright tonic that steadies the mind and restores focus.

focus_draught.name: Focus Draught
focus_draught.description: A more refined focus tonic sold by practiced arcanists.

healing_potion.name: Healing Potion
healing_potion.description: A stronger red tonic sold to people who expect real wounds rather than bad luck.

bread_ration.name: Bread Ration
bread_ration.description: Dark bread, cured cheese, and salted scraps wrapped for a day on the road.

bandage_kit.name: Bandage Kit
bandage_kit.description: A tighter roll of cloth, salve, and pins packed for more serious field treatment.

torch_bundle.name: Torch Bundle
torch_bundle.description: A tied set of road torches kept dry for caves, cellars, and late travel.

rusty_sword.name: Rusty Sword
rusty_sword.description: An old blade with chipped edges, but still useful.

iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.description: A straight, dependable sword balanced for everyday fighting.

war_axe.name: War Axe
war_axe.description: A better-forged axe with the weight and edge to matter when the swing lands cleanly.

battle_axe.name: Battle Axe
battle_axe.description: A broad-headed axe that hits hard when the swing lands cleanly.

spear.name: Spear
spear.description: A simple ash-wood spear valued for reach and reliability.

hunting_spear.name: Hunting Spear
hunting_spear.description: A balanced spear meant for boar, wolves, and anything else best discouraged before it closes.

short_bow.name: Short Bow
short_bow.description: A practical bow for hunters and scouts moving through tight ground.

hunting_bow.name: Hunting Bow
hunting_bow.description: A stronger bow that rewards a steady hand and open sight lines.

longbow.name: Longbow
longbow.description: A taller bow built for a patient draw and harder range than quick forest shooting.

dagger.name: Dagger
dagger.description: A narrow knife made for quick work, close timing, and travelers who dislike empty belts.

apprentice_staff.name: Apprentice Staff
apprentice_staff.description: A rune-bound staff made to help novice casters keep their focus.

spell_focus.name: Spell Focus
spell_focus.description: A warded focus rod that trades reach for steadier arcane alignment in cramped spaces.

novice_grimoire.name: Novice Grimoire
novice_grimoire.description: A stitched training book of basic wards, copied cantrips, and margin notes from safer hands.

padded_coat.name: Padded Coat
padded_coat.description: Layered cloth meant to stop bruising, soften falls, and make a bad blow slightly less bad.

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Worked leather hardened for the road, light enough to move in and honest enough to trust.

chain_vest.name: Chain Vest
chain_vest.description: A sleeveless mesh of linked iron rings that gives real protection without full soldier weight.

iron_shield.name: Iron Shield
iron_shield.description: A compact shield strapped for road use, counted here as protection more than ornament.

leather_vest.name: Leather Vest
leather_vest.description: Layered leather that turns glancing blows into bruises instead of worse.

iron_mail.name: Iron Mail
iron_mail.description: Linked iron rings that add real protection at the cost of weight.

warded_cloak.name: Warded Cloak
warded_cloak.description: A dark cloak sewn with quiet sigils that blunt both fear and force.

road_knife.name: Road Knife
road_knife.description: A quick-drawn knife favored by robbers who expect their work to stay up close.

ritual_knife.name: Ritual Knife
ritual_knife.description: A blackened ceremonial blade still sharp enough to be dangerous in plain hands.

barbed_spear.name: Barbed Spear
barbed_spear.description: A hunting spear with a vicious head, taken from something that meant to keep it.

slime_gel.name: Slime Gel
slime_gel.description: Sticky residue collected from a defeated slime.

wolf_pelt.name: Wolf Pelt
wolf_pelt.description: A rough pelt taken from a forest wolf.

wolf_fang.name: Wolf Fang
wolf_fang.description: A long yellowed fang prized by hunters who want proof of a hard kill.

guardian_sigil.name: Guardian Sigil
guardian_sigil.description: A carved stone sigil taken from the Shrine Guardian.

spider_silk.name: Spider Silk
spider_silk.description: Strong silver-white thread cut from a giant spider's webbing.

bone_charm.name: Bone Charm
bone_charm.description: A splintered charm carried by a restless skeleton.

cultist_seal.name: Cultist Seal
cultist_seal.description: A wax-marked seal taken from a cultist courier.

stolen_satchel.name: Stolen Satchel
stolen_satchel.description: A weathered satchel that still carries someone else's initials.

raider_badge.name: Raider Badge
raider_badge.description: A bent token worn by road raiders to mark who they answer to.

shrine_ash.name: Shrine Ash
shrine_ash.description: Cold grey ash clinging to a fading trace of shrine corruption.

boar_tusk.name: Boar Tusk
boar_tusk.description: A heavy curved tusk chipped from a forest boar built to charge through brush.

troll_tusk.name: Troll Tusk
troll_tusk.description: A heavy tusk chipped from a cave troll's jaw.

sealed_letter.name: Sealed Letter
sealed_letter.description: A folded letter marked with the ferryman's seal.

ruins_rubbing.name: Ruins Rubbing
ruins_rubbing.description: A charcoal rubbing taken from carvings deep in the old ruins.
